---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for RiceLayer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. "I'm always frustrated
when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope check

RiceLayer is free and open source with no paid tiers. Please confirm your
request keeps every feature available to all users and does not add billing,
paywalls, or account gating.

- [ ] This request keeps RiceLayer free for everyone.

## Additional context

Add any mockups, example sites, or context here.
